action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 10 training (Group DRO attempt) produced NaN loss from epoch 0, wasted 2.5h; best eval so far is 0.3999 worst-region (ViT-B, 10 epochs, single GPU). Analysis: Complex approaches caused instability; need a reliable, stable training that can improve within remaining 4h and 20 iterations. Decision: Return to ViT-B fine-tuning (stable), use 4 GPUs for faster iterations, strong augmentation, class-weighted sampling, label smoothing, 30 epochs, log per-region val accuracy, save best checkpoint by worst-region, then submit eval. This should raise worst-region accuracy above 0.3999 safely.
